booking_policy.deposit: A 30% non-refundable deposit is required to confirm any booking.
booking_policy.full_payment_deadline: Full payment is due 30 days before departure.
booking_policy.late_booking: Bookings made within 14 days of departure require full payment immediately.
booking_policy.confirmation: A booking confirmation email with itinerary and vouchers is sent within 24 hours of deposit payment.
booking_policy.name_changes: Name changes are allowed up to 21 days before departure for a fee of $50 per person. Not permitted within 21 days.
booking_policy.group_bookings: Groups of 6 or more receive priority service and a dedicated agent. One free place for every 20 paying passengers.

cancellation_policy.cancellation_process: All cancellations must be submitted in writing via email to cancellations@horizonvista.com. Phone cancellations are not accepted.
cancellation_policy.force_majeure: In cases of natural disasters, pandemics, or government travel bans, HorizonVista will offer a travel credit valid for 18 months instead of a refund.

refund_policy.processing_time: Eligible refunds are processed within 14 business days.
refund_policy.method: Refunds are issued to the original payment method.
refund_policy.partial_refunds: If a specific service fails to be delivered (e.g., a cancelled excursion), a partial refund for that component is issued within 7 business days.
refund_policy.no_show: No refund for no-shows unless covered by travel insurance.

travel_insurance.recommendation: HorizonVista strongly recommends travel insurance for all bookings.
travel_insurance.partner: We partner with AXA Travel Insurance. Policy can be added during booking for approximately $80–$150 USD per person depending on destination and trip length.
travel_insurance.mandatory_destinations: Travel insurance is mandatory for Maldives, Tanzania, and Iceland packages.

visa_policy.responsibility: Clients are responsible for obtaining their own visas unless explicitly stated otherwise.
visa_policy.assistance: HorizonVista provides visa guidance documents and invitation letters where needed at no extra charge.
visa_policy.passport_validity: Passport must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date.
visa_policy.visa_denial: HorizonVista is not responsible for denied visas. Cancellation fees apply unless travel insurance covers it.

children_policy.infants_under_2: Infants under 2 travel free on the lap (no separate seat). A cot at the hotel can be arranged.
children_policy.unaccompanied_minors: Unaccompanied minors under 16 are not accepted on group tours.
children_policy.family_rooms: Family rooms are available for most packages. Request at time of booking.

accessibility_policy.statement: HorizonVista is committed to making travel accessible for all.
accessibility_policy.process: Clients with mobility limitations or medical needs must inform us at least 30 days before departure so we can make appropriate arrangements.
accessibility_policy.limitations: Some adventure activities (e.g., trekking, glacier walks) may not be suitable for all mobility levels. Alternative options will be offered where possible.
